summary: A fortified castle-like structure with four tall corner towers, dark stone walls, and a central courtyard. The building features a crenellated roofline with dark brick/nether brick capping, small window openings, and a symmetrical rectangular footprint. Four corner towers have distinctive overhanging caps with stepped details.

shape.overall_form: rectangular fortification with four corner towers

rebuild_hints: Build four tall corner towers first, each approximately 3-4 blocks wide and 16 blocks tall
Connect towers with stonebrick walls forming a rectangular perimeter
Add small square window openings (1-2 blocks) distributed across wall faces
Create crenellations along top edges using nether brick blocks
Add overhanging caps to each tower with stepped/layered nether brick design
Place foundation blocks (stone or similar) around the base perimeter
Leave central courtyard area open or partially filled
Ensure symmetry across both horizontal axes
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and courtyard details not fully visible
Precise block count for tower height and wall thickness uncertain from angles shown
Whether interior is hollow or partially filled unclear
Exact window placement pattern requires closer inspection
Roof interior structure and support beams not visible
Entrance location not clearly shown in provided views
